title: single source of truth for art library + popup polish
description:
## Summary
- Prod brett was rendering 3‚Äì4 brand-portfolio characters (mentolder digital50/leadership/consulting; korczewski figure-01..04) and **no category toolbar**, even though PR #714 shipped 35 figures across 6 categories (personen/rollen/abstrakta/symbole/raeume/natur).
- Root cause: the `art-library` ConfigMap, generated by `k3d/kustomization.yaml` (korczewski portfolio) and `prod-mentolder/kustomization.yaml` (mentolder portfolio, `behavior: replace`), mounted onto `/app/public/art-library` in the brett pod and shadowed the image's baked-in 35-figure manifest.
- This PR removes the ConfigMap mechanism entirely. The brett image's `brett/public/art-library/` becomes the single source of truth across every cluster.
- Also folds in an in-flight `#optik-popup` polish: popup becomes `position: fixed`, positioned from the button's bounding rect with viewport-clamping and close-on-resize.

## Bug
Not a tracked BR-* ticket ‚Äî `web.mentolder.de/admin/bugs` is in maintenance mode at time of writing.

- Symptom: `brett.mentolder.de` shows 3 chars; `brett.korczewski.de` shows 4. Neither shows the 6-category toolbar. Local/dev shows the full 35-figure set.
- Expected (per PR #714 intent): 35 figures across 6 category tabs on every cluster.
- Cause: per-cluster brand-portfolio ConfigMap overlaid the image directory and replaced the merged content with the older schema (`name_de` / `kind`-grouping, no category field).

## Changes
- `k3d/brett.yaml` ‚Äî drop `art-library` volumeMount + volumes block.
- `k3d/kustomization.yaml` ‚Äî drop `art-library` configMapGenerator (was wiring `art-library/sets/korczewski/portfolio/`).
- `prod-mentolder/kustomization.yaml` ‚Äî drop `art-library` configMapGenerator (was wiring `art-library/sets/mentolder/portfolio/` with `behavior: replace`).
- `brett/public/index.html` ‚Äî `#optik-popup` viewport-clamp polish.

The brand-scoped portfolios at `art-library/sets/{mentolder,korczewski}/` stay on disk; they're just no longer wired into brett. Schema validation (`task test:art-library`) still passes.

## Test plan
- [x] `kubectl kustomize --load-restrictor=LoadRestrictionsNone prod-mentolder` ‚Äî builds clean (16647 lines, no `name: art-library` ConfigMap, brett Deployment has no `art-library` volume).
- [x] `kubectl kustomize --load-restrictor=LoadRestrictionsNone prod-korczewski` ‚Äî builds clean (16257 lines).
- [x] `kubectl kustomize --load-restrictor=LoadRestrictionsNone k3d` ‚Äî builds clean (15030 lines).
- [x] `task workspace:validate ENV=mentolder` ‚Äî ‚úì Manifests are valid.
- [x] `task workspace:validate ENV=korczewski` ‚Äî ‚úì Manifests are valid.
- [x] `task test:all` ‚Äî green.
- [ ] Post-merge: `task feature:brett` ‚Üí check `brett.mentolder.de` + `brett.korczewski.de` show the 6 category tabs + 35 figures.

ü§ñ Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
